hero.title: Sell or rent your property in Marrakech
hero.subtitle: Free valuation, professional presentation, and exposure to thousands of international buyers.

1.title: Valuation
1.description: Free and realistic valuation of your property by our experts.

2.title: Presentation
2.description: Professional photos, virtual tour and optimised description.

3.title: Exposure
3.description: Your listing is shown to our network of qualified buyers.

4.title: Sale
4.description: Support all the way to the signing at the notary.

estimation.question: How much does a valuation cost?
estimation.answer: The valuation of your property is entirely free and with no commitment. Our experts analyse your property based on the local market, the property's features and recent neighbourhood trends.

duration.question: How long does it take to sell?
duration.answer: The average time to sell in Marrakech is 3 to 6 months depending on the neighbourhood and property type. Luxury villas may take a little longer, while well-located apartments sell more quickly.

documents.question: What documents are needed?
documents.answer: Land title, plot plan, deed of ownership, and tax certificates. Our team helps you put your file together.

remote.question: Can I sell from abroad?
remote.answer: Yes, a power of attorney signed at a notary in your country is enough to represent your sale. We handle the entire transaction remotely.

fees.question: What are the agency fees?
fees.answer: Agency fees are generally 5% incl. VAT for sales, payable by the buyer. This rate may vary depending on the mandate and property type.

signing.question: How does the signing work?
signing.answer: The signing takes place at the notary or Adoul, with a translator if needed. We organise all appointments and support you at every step.

depot.title: Publish a listing
depot.description: Publish your listing for free and reach buyers directly. Unlimited photos, detailed description, and instant visibility.

sell.title: Sell with Atlas Rouge
sell.description: Trust our experienced agents to sell your property. We handle valuation, marketing, and the full transaction.

agents.title: Find an agent
agents.subtitle: Our local experts at your service.
